channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Point of Care Testing (non-IUS)
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Point of Care Testing (non-IUS)

item.title: Fluorescent Nanosensor for Indole-3-Propionic Acid Detection in Gut Health Monitoring.
item.description: Advanced healthcare materials - The gut microbiota plays a pivotal role in bio-transforming dietary components, including tryptophan, an essential amino acid that undergoes microbial metabolism. Microbial metabolism of tryptophan...
